data.title: 'Problem Is Much Larger:' After Boeing's Plea Deal Is Rejected By Federal Court Over Monitor Provision, Experts Blame 'Fundamentally Broken' System 'In Dire Need Of Reform'
data.description: The plea agreement between the U.S. Justice Department and Boeing regarding the company's involvement in two fatal 737 Max jetliner crashes has been dismissed by a federal court. The rejection was due to the proposed monitor provision, which has sparked a debate on the need for a complete overhaul of the system.

data.title: Ford EV Sales Surge In November On Strong Mustang Mach-E Sales Despite Drop In Lightning EV Pickup Popularity
data.description: Ford Motor said on Wednesday that the company sold 10,821 electric vehicles in the U.S. in November, marking a growth of 20.8% from last year, after its Mustang Mach-E SUV sales surged to balance the fall in sales of the F-150 Lightning EV pickup truck.

data.title: Shiba Inu's Shytoshi Kusama Denies Links With 'Hawk Tuah' Girl's Pump-And-Dump Memecoin, Advises Community To Stay Away
data.description: Shytoshi Kusama, the pseudonymous lead of the Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) ecosystem, on Thursday, distanced themselves from the controversial meme coin launched by influencer Haliey Welch of the “Hawk Tuah” fame.

data.title: Jim Cramer Admits To 'Sweating' Bullish Calls As Ulta, Lululemon, DocuSign Rally: 'You Need To Be Safe And Sensible, Too'
data.description: Jim Cramer urged caution on Thursday, Dec. 5, 2024, despite strong earnings beats from major retailers, as Ulta Beauty Inc, Lululemon Athletica Inc, and DocuSign Inc all saw significant after-hours gains.

data.title: Marc Andreessen Emerges As Trump And Musk's Talent Scout For DOGE Cost Cutting Mission: Report
data.description: Venture capital powerhouse Marc Andreessen has emerged as a crucial figure in recruiting talent for President-elect Donald Trump's new Department of Government Efficiency.
